# DS18B20 Sensor Skill (Battlestar-Ventana)

This module provides deterministic, reproducible guidance for integrating DS18B20 sensors into ESPHome and Home Assistant.

Contents

- Wiring diagrams
- ESPHome templates
- Home Assistant package templates
- Calibration workflows
- Naming and wiring conventions
- Examples (see examples.md)
- Integration

This sub-skill is part of the Battlestar-Ventana sensor and telemetry hierarchy and is intended to produce ready-to-paste files for the VS Code Paste-as-Files extension.
